pageDesc: Help us build the best open-source Web3 education platform
noSponsors: No sponsors yet. Be the first!
disclosureBody: Support, sponsorship, and affiliate links help fund maintenance, translations, new lessons, and AI-native tooling. They do not influence lesson conclusions, security warnings, or curriculum order.
donationDisclosure: Donation platforms are optional support channels. They do not buy placement, endorsements, or control over educational content.
cryptoDisclosure: Crypto tips are irreversible. Verify the address, network, and asset before sending; this page will not ask for seed phrases, private keys, or wallet signatures.
affiliateDisclosure: Affiliate links may generate commission or referral benefits for the author. Exchange links are not investment advice, trading recommendations, or a suggestion to use leverage.
sponsorDisclosure: Paid sponsor placements are disclosed when present. Sponsors cannot change lesson conclusions or remove safety warnings.
